---
title: "evcharge"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-21"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
```

# Read the data

```{r}
ev_df <- read_csv("data/Electric_Vehicle_Charging_Station_Data.csv")
ev_df <- clean_names(ev_df)
```

```{r}
stations_locations_class <- read_csv("data/stations.csv")
```

```{r}
ev_df <- ev_df %>% 
  left_join(
    stations_locations_class %>% 
      select(station_name, osm_class, osm_type), 
    by = "station_name"
  )
```

```{r}
rm(stations_locations_class)
```

```{r}
ev_df <- ev_df %>% select(
  everything(),
  -c(
    address,
    city,
    state_province,
    zip_postal_code,
    start_time_zone,
    end_time_zone,
    total_duration_hh_mm_ss,
    port_type,
    object_id,
    object_id2
  )
)
```

```{r}
ev_df <- ev_df %>%
  mutate(station_code = as.integer(factor(station_name)),
         start_date_time = coalesce(mdy_hm(start_date_time), ymd_hms(start_date_time)),
         end_date_time = coalesce(mdy_hm(end_date_time), ymd_hms(end_date_time)),
         charging_time_h = as.numeric(charging_time_hh_mm_ss) / 3600) %>%
  select(station_code, everything(), -station_name, -charging_time_hh_mm_ss)
```


```{r}
ev_df_grouped_by_day <- ev_df %>%
  group_by(station_code, start_date = date(start_date_time)) %>%
  summarise(usage_time = sum(charging_time_h),
            energy_k_wh = sum(energy_k_wh),
            osm_class = first(osm_class),
            osm_type = first(osm_type)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(station_code, osm_class, osm_type) %>%
  complete(
    start_date = seq(date(min(
      ev_df$start_date_time
    )), date(max(
      ev_df$start_date_time
    )), by = 1),
    fill = list(usage_time = 0, energy_k_wh = 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
ev_df_grouped_by_week <- ev_df_grouped_by_day %>% 
  mutate(week = year(start_date) + (week(start_date)-1)/52) %>%
  group_by(station_code, week) %>%
  summarise(usage_time = sum(usage_time),
            energy_k_wh = sum(energy_k_wh),
            osm_class = first(osm_class),
            osm_type = first(osm_type)) %>%
  ungroup()
```


```{r}

plotf <- \(df) df %>% ggplot(aes(x = week, y = energy_k_wh, group = station_code)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = str_c("Weekly energy consumption for station ", first(df$station_code)),
       subtitle = str_c("Class ", first(df$osm_class), ", Type ", first(df$osm_type)))


lapply(ev_df_grouped_by_week %>% group_split(station_code), plotf)

```
